items.summary: Fix the exchange rate fetching in useQueries.ts so that live rates are successfully retrieved from open.er-api.com (with fallback to the Fawaz CDN API). Ensure network errors are handled gracefully and the UI displays a meaningful error state when all fetch attempts fail rather than silently breaking.

Verify and fix the backend Motoko actor's fetchExchangeRates HTTP outcall. Ensure the outbound GET request to the exchange rate API endpoint is correctly formed, the transform function properly sanitizes the HTTP response, and the actor returns valid rate data to the frontend.
